rows.label: qev015391_MSG0001
rows.name: Excuse me, [ST:gender p1=sir p2=ma'am ], may I help you with— Oh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0002
rows.name:
You must be the [ST:gender p1=man p2=woman ]who wanted to arrange a
memorial service here at the cathedral.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0003
rows.name: ...You're not? Oh. I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0004
rows.name:
Forgive the confusion. Someone
came by the cathedral with that
request while I was away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0005
rows.name:
But the person who took the message
forgot to get the visitor's name, and
no one seems to know who it was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0006
rows.name:
I was hoping to hold the service as soon as possible.
I would be remiss if I failed to do everything in
my power to ease the suffering of the bereaved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0007
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you don't mind my asking, as a BLADE who
travels widely throughout the city, might you
be able to surmise the identity of the bereaved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0009
rows.name:
The only information I have is that this
person runs a restaurant in the commercial
district and recently lost a son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_JNK0010
rows.name: Guess Pollen[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_SEL0011
rows.name: Speculate that it's probably Pollen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_JNK0020
rows.name: Guess Bergamot[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_SEL0021
rows.name: Speculate that it's probably Bergamot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0010
rows.name:
You say Pollen is mourning the
loss of a regular named Bobby
who was like a son to her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0011
rows.name:
And you recently reclaimed
Bobby's personal effects?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0012
rows.name:
Yes, that makes sense.
Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0013
rows.name:
I shall prepare a fine memorial service
for Bobby, in hopes that it might bring
some measure of solace to Pollen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0014
rows.name:
Of course, the best way to heal
the pain of a loss like that would
be to reclaim the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0015
rows.name:
Then all of our fallen could
return in their mortal forms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ah, I know Bergamot. She works
at the same café as Latte.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0017
rows.name:
To remain so stoic despite the
loss of her beloved son...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0018
rows.name:
What a truly strong-hearted person she must
be! Although I suppose she'd have to be to
look after Latte day in and day out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thank you very much. I will go straight to her
shop and begin preparing a memorial service
to bring her some small measure of solace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0020
rows.name:
Of course, the best way to heal
the pain of a loss like that would
be to reclaim the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015391_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then all of our fallen could
return in their mortal forms.[ST:wait ]
